title: S64 5TL, Rotherham Waste Oils Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/KP3732KJ/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Rotherham Waste Oils Limited Installation name: Kilnhurst Waste Oil Recovery Facility Permit number: EPR/KP3732KJ  "
